title: Tekshar Falls Casino
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Structure |image= |name=Tekshar Falls Casino |constructed=Prior to [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' |destroyed= |type= |location=[[Kuat City]], [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]] |interest= |rebuilt= |builder=[[Tirual Construction Holdings]] |height=Over thirteen stories |width= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|Very impressive.|Mirta Gev|}} The '''Tekshar Falls Casino''' was a [[Casino/Legends|gambling establishment]] located in [[Kuat City]], the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]]. An architectural marvel built into the [[Tekshar Falls]], the casino featured opulently designed interiors, luxury suites, fine [[Restaurant/Legends|dining]], and [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] tables for [[Gambler/Legends|gamblers]] to [[Gambling/Legends|play]] at. In the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] and his granddaughter [[Mirta Gev]] visited the Tekshar Falls Casino in search of information on the whereabouts of [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jaing Skirata]]. The two [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] met with the [[Gangster/Legends|gangster]] [[L. Fraig|Fraig]] in one of the casino's private suites, but the meeting quickly turned hostile after Fett [[Fibercord/Legends|hung]] Fraig from the suite's balcony in an effort to coax his compliance. Having acquired a lead on Skirata, Fett and Gev escaped the Tekshar Falls via their [[Jetpack/Legends|jetpacks]] and departed Kuat soon after. ==Description== {{Quote|Is this how they stop the riffraff from coming in?''"
"''We ''are'' the riffraff. And we're going in.|Mirta Gev and Boba Fett, regarding the powerful waterfall at the Tekshar's entrance|}} Located in [[Kuat City]], the [[capital]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core World]] of [[Kuat]],''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' the Tekshar Falls Casino was built into the rocky cliff face beneath the eponymous [[Tekshar Falls]], part constructed materials and part natural [[Stone/Legends|stone]]. The five-hundred-[[Meter/Legends|meter]], [[Human/Legends|man]]-made [[Water/Legends|waterfall]] was made to serve as an extravagant entrance to the [[Casino/Legends|casino]], requiring prospective [[Gambler/Legends|gamblers]] to make their way down a [[Tree/Legends|tree]]-lined boulevard to the base of the falls and cross a footbridge through the wall of water. Inlaid [[Motion sensor/Legends|motion sensors]] triggered automated [[Force field/Legends|force fields]] that parted the downpour on approach, forming a wide, dry portal in the falls for guests to pass through. Several turret outcroppings protruded through the falls from the casino within, and the rushing waterfall also provided its own [[Hydroelectric power generator|hydroelectric power]] to the Tekshar. Behind the falls entrance, the Tekshar was warm, dry, and vividly lit. Inside, the lobby was opulently decorated, featuring flocked wall coverings, thick [[Color/Legends|purple]] [[Carpet/Legends|carpeting]], gilding, numerous [[Mirror/Legends|mirrors]], and low-level lighting. A front desk attended by a [[steward]] was positioned to welcome guests, and the lobby parted into two sections, one leading off toward the Tekshar Falls' [[Restaurant/Legends|restaurant]] while the other led to the [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] tables. The Tekshar's restaurant offered a [[Wine/Legends|wine]] list to patrons featuring a number of selections. Above the lobby, over thirteen floors filled with various suites, salons, and gaming tables were accessible by [[Turbolift/Legends|turbolift]]. Suites at the Tekshar Falls Casino could be furnished with gilt-framed [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] tables, beverage-stocked kitchens, and through a pair of [[Transparisteel/Legends|transparisteel]] doors, a railed balcony offering a view overlooking Kuat City, kept dry by an overhang that diverted the water from the falls. ==History== {{Quote|Right now I need to walk into the Tekshar and have a chat with Fraig. That might be a little inconvenient for him.|Boba Fett|}} Built by the [[Tirual Construction Holdings]] company in Kuat [[City/Legends|City]] in the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] prior to the outbreak of the [[Second Galactic Civil War]], the Tekshar Falls Casino became renown as a [[Kuati/Legends|Kuati]] feat of engineering near impossibility for its impressive use of the Tekshar Falls as an extravagant water feature. By that [[Time/Legends|time]], the reigning [[Mandalore (title)/Legends|''Mand'alor'']] [[Boba Fett]] owned [[Interstellar Stock Exchange/Legends|shares]] in the casino via his investments in Tirual Construction Holdings. In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], Fett and his granddaughter [[Mirta Gev]] were searching for the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] known as [[Jaing Skirata]]. After learning that Skirata had killed a [[Gangster/Legends|gangster]] named [[Cherit]] from the [[Unidentified bartender (Paradise Cantina)|bartender]] of the [[Paradise Cantina]] on Kuat's [[Moon/Legends|moon]], [[Bador]], the two were directed to the Tekshar Falls Casino in order to speak with Cherit's former associate and Skirata's potential employer, [[L. Fraig]]. Following the lead to Kuat City, Fett and Gev visited the Tekshar. After checking in with the casino's front desk, the pair were escorted to the Tekshar's thirteenth floor by a [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] footman where they met with Fraig in his private suite. Despite Fett's initial attempts to amicably persuade the gangster to share what information he knew about Skirata, violence soon broke out when Fraig was not forthcoming and Fett [[Fibercord/Legends|hung]] the gangster from the balcony in an effort to intimidate him. Though Fraig revealed what he knew under duress, Fett and Gev were forced to flee the casino and Fraig's [[Bodyguard/Legends|guards]] over the balcony with the use of their [[Jetpack/Legends|jetpacks]]. ==Behind the scenes== The Tekshar Falls Casino first appeared in the novel [[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice|''Sacrifice'']], the fifth entry in the multi-[[Author/Legends|author]] ''[[Star Wars: Legacy of the Force]]'' series, written by [[Karen Traviss]] and published [[May 29]], [[2007]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Tekshar Falls-Kasino }} [[Category:Casinos]] [[Category:Kuat locations]]
